name: Glass Room Spray Coconut Water and Orchid 3.4 fl oz - Threshold™
description:
Uplift your ambiance with the Glass Room Spray Coconut Water and Orchid 3.4 fl oz from Threshold™. Infused with blended essential oils, this 3.4 fl oz spray delivers a soothing mix of coconut water and orchid, creating a calming and inviting atmosphere. Ideal for spritzing in bedrooms, living areas or any space that needs a refreshing lift, this spray is handy and easy to use for a quick refresh.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you™
